strategy: Enter on Round 1. Late arrivals get hit with Sand Wurm.
He self-casts a protected all-enemies Feint that boosts his hits on you, so keep a shield or heal ready for the follow-up natural attack (up to 420 Death).
He is stunable and beguilable. Use either to skip a threatening turn while you set up.
Hit anything but Death. He resists Death 70%, so prism if you are a Death wizard.
Stack blades over two or three Rounds and drop one hit. At 9,370 Health he goes down solo.
cheatNotes: The only cheat is a punish for arriving late: join before Round 2 or eat a Sand Wurm.
